channel.title: Visualisation on Christian Mahnke
channel.description: Recent content in Visualisation on Christian Mahnke

item.title: Blog metadata visualised
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: About a year ago, I tried visualising the blog content…

item.title: "Patching" OpenStreetMap data
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: “Counterfactual architecture” yields almost no results on Google (at least in German)….

item.title: Keyword pairs visualised
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: Sometimes experiments don’t bring the desired results…

item.title: Visualisation AI segmentation with HDR
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: The first step towards visually supported annotation with HDR…

item.title: Climate change in art...
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: …is “old news” by now: Neither when it comes to the effects that can be recognised in old works, nor as an object of art itself.

item.title: Pong Visualisation
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: For some reason I came up with the idea of visualising Pong…
